channex.provisionDone: Channex updated: {{rtCreated}} room type(s) created, {{rtSkipped}} skipped; {{rpCreated}} rate plan(s) created, {{rpSkipped}} skipped.
channex.noPermission: Channel Manager is limited to owner and manager.

channex.step3.intro: For each room category, map OpenPMS rate plans to Channex rate plans.
